name: Albania (Shqipëria)
summary: Albania is a Western Balkans civil-law unitary republic whose family-law framework operates under the Family Code (Kodi i Familjes, Law 9062/2003) in force 21 December 2003. Parental responsibility (përgjegjësia prindërore) is governed by Kodi i Familjes arts. 215-255; joint exercise during marriage is the statutory default. The Gjykata e Lartë (High Court of Albania, Tirana) is the apex court for civil and criminal matters; the Gjykata Kushtetuese (Constitutional Court) operates separate constitutional-review and individual-constitutional-complaint jurisdiction. Psychology profession is regulated under Law 40/2016 (On the Profession of Psychologist) establishing the Urdhri i Psikologut (Order of Psychologists) — statutory professional-order regime. Albania is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label; courts operate substantively under the interesi më i lartë i fëmijës (best-interests-of-the-child) standard. Council of Europe member; ECHR Strasbourg jurisprudence applies.

statutory_framework.title: Family Code 2003 — Parental responsibility
statutory_framework.relevance: Federal statute on family law in force 21 December 2003. Arts. 215-255 govern parental responsibility; joint exercise during marriage is the statutory default. Welfare standard codified.

statutory_framework.citation: Law 40/2016 — On the Profession of Psychologist
statutory_framework.title: Law on the Profession of Psychologist
statutory_framework.relevance: Federal statute establishing the Urdhri i Psikologut (Order of Psychologists) as statutory professional-order regulator. Mandatory membership for practising psychologists.

apex_courts.name: Gjykata e Lartë (High Court of Albania)
Gjykata Kushtetuese (Constitutional Court)
apex_courts.role: Constitutional Court with original jurisdiction over constitutional review and individual constitutional complaints.

professional_regulators.name: Urdhri i Psikologut të Shqipërisë (Order of Psychologists of Albania)

anonymisation_convention: Albanian family-law decisions are anonymised per Gjykata e Lartë practice using initials.
structural_findings: Albania sits structurally within the Western Balkans civil-law cluster alongside Serbia + Croatia + Slovenia + Montenegro + N. Macedonia — Family Code 2003 + welfare-standard family-court framework + Constitutional Court individual-complaint jurisdiction.

Urdhri i Psikologut statutory professional-order regime places Albania among the federal-statutory psychology regulator group within the corpus (order tradition alongside Romania CPR + Croatia HPK + Portugal OPP).

sources.title: Qendra e Botimeve Zyrtare (QBZ) — Official Publications Centre

editorial_notes: Albania jurisdiction sidecar — Western Balkans civil-law framework. Kodi i Familjes 2003 + Law 40/2016 + Constitutional Court individual-complaint.
PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator.
Joins Western Balkans + statutory professional-order psychology regulator clusters.
